agent_summary: Customer reports sending 5000 BDT via transaction TXN-9101 to an unintended recipient. Transaction history is consistent with the complaint.
recommended_next_action: Verify transaction TXN-9101 details and initiate the wrong-transfer dispute workflow per policy.
customer_reply: We have noted your concern about transaction TXN-9101. Our dispute team will review the case and any eligible amount will be returned through official channels. Please do not share your PIN or OTP with anyone.
